name: Sweet & Sour Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Kamut spirals according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Drain and rinse the kidney beans and black beans separately.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, diced red pepper, green onion pieces, and dried basil.
4. Prepare the dressing by mixing 3 tbsp of dried basil with equal parts olive oil and vinegar in a small bowl until well combined.
5. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture and stir to coat evenly.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
7. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.
